label: Ancient shrine resolver
description: Generates an ancient shrine. Inherits base SymbolResolver fields and adds loot probability fields.

techprintChance.label: Techprint chance
techprintChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a techprint is spawned inside the shrine.

bladelinkChance.label: Bladelink chance
bladelinkChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a bladelink weapon is spawned inside the shrine.

psychicChance.label: Psychic chance
psychicChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a psychic item is spawned inside the shrine.
